landing.title: AZSchedule
landing.subtitle: Manage your tasks efficiently
landing.description: AstraMind helps you manage tasks efficiently with AI-powered insights, smart analytics, and an intuitive interface designed for maximum productivity.
landing.powerfulFeatures: Powerful features designed to help you stay organized and productive
landing.smartTaskDesc: Organize your tasks with categories, priorities, and deadlines. Never miss an important task again.
landing.aiInsightsDesc: Get intelligent recommendations and productivity insights powered by advanced AI technology.
landing.analyticsDesc: Track your productivity with detailed analytics, heatmaps, and performance metrics.
landing.focusModeDesc: Eliminate distractions with Pomodoro timer and focus sessions to maximize productivity.
landing.aiTaskDesc: Create tasks naturally using AI - just describe what you need and let AI handle the details.
landing.secureDesc: Your data is encrypted and secure. We respect your privacy and never share your information.
landing.getStartedSteps: Get started in three simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Sign up for free and set up your profile in seconds
landing.step2Desc: Create tasks manually or use AI to extract from text and images
landing.step3Desc: Monitor your productivity with analytics and AI insights
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of users who are already managing their tasks more efficiently with AstraMind
landing.intelligentPlatform: The intelligent task management platform that helps you organize your life and boost productivity with AI-powered insights.
landing.feedbackDesc: We'd love to hear from you!
landing.name: Name
landing.feedbackSent: Your email client will open shortly.
landing.feedbackError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs

confirmDialog.message: Are you sure you want to proceed?
confirmDialog.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.subtitle: Get started with AstraMind in just a few simple steps
quickStart.step1Desc: Start by creating a task to organize your work. Add a title, description, priority, and due date.
quickStart.step2Desc: Create categories to group related tasks together. Use colors to make them easy to identify.
quickStart.step3Desc: View your productivity analytics, completion rates, and activity heatmaps to understand your work patterns.
quickStart.step4Desc: Use AI to create tasks from natural language or extract tasks from images. Get smart productivity insights.
quickStart.allStepsCompleted: You've completed all the quick start steps. You're ready to boost your productivity!
quickStart.needHelpDesc: Check out our comprehensive documentation for detailed guides on all features.

tutorial.helpCenterDesc: Get started with interactive guides and documentation
tutorial.needHelpFooter: Need more help? Contact support anytime
tutorial.welcomeDesc: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started. This is your dashboard where you can see an overview of all your tasks and productivity.
tutorial.tasksMenuDesc: Click here to view and manage all your tasks. You can create, edit, and organize your tasks from this page.
tutorial.addTaskDesc: Click this button to create a new task. You can add a title, description, priority, category, and due date.
tutorial.categoriesDesc: Categories help you group related tasks together. Create categories for different areas of your life like Work, Personal, or Health.
tutorial.analyticsDesc: View detailed analytics about your productivity, including completion rates, activity heatmaps, and AI-powered insights.
tutorial.aiTaskCreationDesc: Use AI to create tasks from natural language or extract tasks from images. Just describe what you need or upload a screenshot, and AI will handle the rest!
tutorial.scheduleSuggestionsDesc: Get intelligent suggestions to optimize your schedule. AI analyzes your tasks and recommends better time slots for improved productivity.
tutorial.aiInsightsDesc: Receive personalized productivity insights powered by AI. Get recommendations on your work patterns, strengths, and areas for improvement.
tutorial.notificationsDesc: Check your notifications here for task reminders, updates, and important system messages.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Complete guide to using AstraMind
docs.overviewDesc: AstraMind is an intelligent task management platform that helps you organize your life and boost productivity with AI-powered insights. This documentation will guide you through all the features and help you get the most out of the platform.
overviewFeatures: Smart task management with priorities and deadlines
AI-powered task creation from natural language and images
docs.tasksDesc: Tasks are the core of AstraMind. Each task can have a title, description, priority level, status, category, and due date.
creatingTasksSteps: Navigate to the Tasks page from the sidebar
Fill in the task details (title is required)
Select a category, priority, and status
Set start and end dates if needed
taskPropertiesList: Title: A brief description of what needs to be done
Description: Detailed information about the task
Status: To Do, In Progress, Done, or Paused
Start Date: When you plan to begin
docs.categoriesDesc: Categories help you group related tasks together. You can assign colors to categories for easy visual identification.
usingCategoriesList: Create categories for different areas of your life (Work, Personal, Health, etc.)
Assign colors to make them visually distinct
Filter tasks by category to focus on specific areas
View category-based analytics to see where you spend most time
docs.analyticsDesc: The Analytics page provides detailed insights into your productivity patterns, helping you understand when you're most productive and where you can improve.
analyticsFeaturesList: Activity Heatmap: See your task activity by day and hour
Status Distribution: Understand your task completion patterns
Priority Distribution: See how you prioritize your work
Category Breakdown: Analyze time spent on different areas
docs.aiDesc: AstraMind uses advanced AI to help you create tasks faster and get personalized productivity insights.
aiCapabilitiesList: Natural Language Task Creation: Describe tasks in plain English and AI extracts all details
Image-based Task Extraction: Upload screenshots of calendars or todo lists
Productivity Insights: Get personalized recommendations based on your patterns
Schedule Optimization: AI suggests better task scheduling
Smart Reminders: AI learns when you need reminders
docs.notificationsDesc: Notifications keep you informed about important updates, deadlines, and system messages.
notificationsList: Mark notifications as read or unread
Delete notifications you no longer need
docs.focusModeDesc: Focus Mode helps you eliminate distractions and stay concentrated on your work using the Pomodoro Technique.
focusModeSteps: Click on Focus Mode from the dashboard
Start the timer and focus on your task
Take breaks when the timer alerts you
docs.tipsDesc: Here are some best practices to get the most out of AstraMind:
tipsList: Review your tasks every morning and prioritize your day
Use the High priority for urgent and important tasks only
Break large tasks into smaller, manageable subtasks
Set realistic deadlines to avoid overwhelming yourself
Use categories to maintain work-life balance
Check your analytics weekly to identify productivity patterns
Try Focus Mode during your most productive hours
Use AI task creation to save time on task entry
docs.stillNeedHelpDesc: If you have questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to our support team or check the Quick Start guide.

subscription.securePaymentDesc: We use secure and encrypted payment methods
subscription.instantAccessDesc: After payment, you can immediately use AI features
